member.name: M:IntervencoesAPI.Controllers.ClienteController.GetAll(PageParameters)
member.summary: Gets a paginated list of clientes.
member.param: Pagination parameters (page number and page size).
member.remarks: Returns a paged result containing the requested page of clientes.

member.name: M:IntervencoesAPI.Controllers.ClienteController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.param: The cliente identifier.
member.remarks: Returns the cliente resource if found.

member.name: M:IntervencoesAPI.Controllers.ClienteController.GetByReferencia(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a cliente by its reference value.
member.param: The reference value to search for.
member.remarks: Returns the cliente resource that matches the provided .
member.response: The query parameter is missing or invalid.

member.name: M:IntervencoesAPI.Controllers.ClienteController.GetByIdEntidae(System.Int32,PageParameters)
member.summary: Gets clientes for a given entidade identifier (paged).
member.param: The entidade identifier to filter clientes by.
Pagination parameters (page number and page size).
member.remarks: Returns a paged result containing clientes associated with the provided .
member.response: No clientes were found for the provided entidade identifier.

member.name: M:IntervencoesAPI.Controllers.ClienteController.Create(IntervencoesAPI.Dtos.CreateCliente)
member.param: The data used to create a new cliente.
member.remarks: Creates a new cliente and returns the created resource with its generated identifier.

member.name: M:IntervencoesAPI.Controllers.ClienteController.Update(System.Int32,IntervencoesAPI.Dtos.UpdateCliente)
member.param: The cliente identifier.
The data used to update the cliente.
member.remarks: Updates the cliente identified by and returns the updated resource.

member.name: M:IntervencoesAPI.Controllers.ClienteController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.param: The cliente identifier.
member.remarks: Deletes the cliente identified by .

member.remarks: The value is matched against the Referencia field.

member.name: M:IntervencoesAPI.Controllers.EntidadeController.GetDetails(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets an entidade with related data (details view).
member.param: The entidade identifier.
member.remarks: Returns an aggregated DTO that includes the entidade and its related clientes, processos, and intervenções.

member.param: The reference value to search for. This value is read from the query string parameter named referncia.
member.remarks: The provided value is matched against the Referencia field.
member.response: The referncia query parameter is missing or invalid.

member.name: M:IntervencoesAPI.Controllers.ProcessoProjectoController.GetidCliente(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a processo/projecto by client identifier.
member.param: The client identifier to search for. This value is read from the query string parameter named idCliente.
member.remarks: Returns the first processo/projecto whose ClienteId matches the provided client identifier.

Pagination parameters (page number and page size).
member.returns: A paged list containing clientes associated with the provided entidade identifier.

member.name: P:PageParameters.PageNumber
member.summary: Use for page number that is passed from frontend.

member.name: P:PageParameters.PageSize
member.summary: Use for page size that is passed from frontend.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
member.returns: The normalized documentation comment ID.
